name: Levi (Bug Fables)
description:
Levi is a ladybug in bug fables and explorer of team Celia. Despite ladybugs being banned under order of Queen Elizant II Levi seems to be an exception as an explorer in her service.
He also seems to have a modest nature similar to Kabbu of team snakemouth.

Fun Fact: Levi was the first character created for Bug fables and was originally going to be named Leif before they settled with Levi.

The art in the picture comes from Maci Lena on Twitter/X.
creator: Sir_Ryan
